refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall analyze the worksite area by identifying terrain features, detecting obstacles, and representing the work-zone accurately.
refined_fr.rationale: Breaking down the broad requirement into specific sub-functions ensures clarity and targeted design: terrain analysis, obstacle detection, and work-zone representation are distinct but collectively fulfill the overall mapping requirement.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify each sub-function by comparing generated terrain models against surveyed data, obstacle detection accuracy via sensor validation, and work-zone representation correctness through stakeholder review.
sub_frs: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area
Detect and classify obstacles within the worksite
Generate and represent the work-zone boundaries and features

candidate_dps: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle analysis
Apply machine learning algorithms for obstacle classification
Implement GIS-based digital mapping for work-zone representation
selected_dp.selected_dp: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle analysis; Apply machine learning algorithms for obstacle classification; Implement GIS-based digital mapping for work-zone representation

potential_sources: Data dependency between terrain and obstacle analysis
Integration between obstacle classification and work-zone representation
coupling_check.notes: The selected DPs are logically cohesive and modular, with well-defined data flows minimizing tight coupling.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of high-quality sensor data
Risk of ML model misclassification impacting safety
GIS mapping accuracy depends on up-to-date site data
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Monitor ML model performance and update training data regularly; ensure sensor calibration protocols.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Central processing and analysis of worksite mapping data including sensor fusion, ML classification, and GIS mapping

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw sensor data (LIDAR, camera) from Vehicle

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends processed mapping data and work-zone models to Vehicle and Teleoperation modules

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Communicates mapping updates and receives configuration commands

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment of mapping logic and data processing; minimal diffusion as interfaces are well-defined.
Vehicle provides raw data but does not contain mapping logic; high diffusion if mapping logic placed here.
Primarily for control and monitoring; low containment for mapping functions.
Safety Services consume alerts but do not perform mapping; poor containment.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing mapping functions in NGHE Solution module ensures high cohesion and manageable interfaces.
containment_risks: Potential performance bottleneck if all sensor data processing centralized
Dependency on network link reliability for timely updates
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Consider distributed processing if performance issues arise; implement robust network error handling.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR refinement clearly decomposes the requirement into manageable sub-functions; selected DPs logically address each sub-FR with minimal coupling.

diffusion_risks: Centralized processing may cause diffusion if interfaces are not strictly managed
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: NGHE Solution module shows strong containment scores, indicating good architectural packaging.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via sensor data validation and stakeholder reviews of generated maps.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of mapping functions to NGHE Solution module with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Monitor ML model accuracy and update training data
Evaluate performance impact of centralized processing

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment meet the requirements and architectural criteria with manageable risks.
next_level_sub_frs: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area
Detect and classify obstacles within the worksite
Generate and represent the work-zone boundaries and features

revise.why: No immediate revisions required; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: ML models can be trained and validated effectively
Network link is reliable for data exchange
open_risks: Network link failures causing stale mapping data
